articles.title: Luka Doncic injury update: Latest on Lakers star ahead of Game 2 vs Thunder
articles.description: Luka Doncic’s recovery from a Grade 2 hamstring strain continues to cloud the Lakers’ playoff hopes ahead of Game 2 against the Thunder. After undergoing PRP treatments in Spain, Doncic admitted there is still no firm return timeline, while medical criticism surrounding the treatment has intensified concern. With the Lakers trailing 1-0 and dealing with more injuries in the rotation, LeBron James and the rest of the roster face mounting pressure to keep the series alive without their superstar guard.

articles.title: Virat Kohli's 'Advice' Led To His Own Downfall Against LSG, Prince Yadav Reveals How
articles.description: LSG's Prince Yadav reacts after dismissing Virat Kohli.

articles.title: BCCI warns of ‘honey trap’, IPL teams told to ‘prohibit unauthorised entry’; vapes banned: Full list of dos, don'ts
articles.description: The BCCI secretary, Devajit Saikia, wrote to all 10 IPL franchises, outlining the dos and don'ts. Check the full list here.

articles.title: IPL playoff qualification scenarios: RCB still in control despite Lucknow setback
articles.description: Royal Challengers Bengaluru's playoff hopes remain strong despite a recent loss, holding a solid third place with 12 points. While their Net Run Rate offers a crucial advantage, top-order batting instability is a growing concern. One more win could secure their spot, but avoiding a late collapse against tough upcoming opponents is vital for a smooth qualification. RCB still look like a strong playoff contender, but unless they rediscover consistency quickly, the final stretch of the league phase could become far tighter than it currently appears.

articles.title: Virat Kohli vs Wasim Akram: What would happen if the two cricket giants collided at their peak in a Super Over showdown
articles.description: What if the greatest left-arm fast bowler bowled to the greatest ODI batter of all time? The Virat Kohli vs Wasim Akram battle would have been quite something.

articles.title: Jitesh Sharma’s lack of game awareness cost Royal Challengers Bengaluru dear against Lucknow Super Giants
articles.description: If instead of being adventurous, the RCB vice-captain had been a bit circumspect, RCB would have gone top of the table.

articles.title: Valverde out of El Clasico due to injury after Tchouameni clash, Uruguay star says: 'Everything blown out of proportion'
articles.description: Fede Valverde has downplayed his training ground clash with teammate Aurelien Tchouameni and said that his head injury is entirely unrelated to the fight.

articles.title: IndyCar faces major criticism after Abraham Lincoln Freedom 250 shirt sparks heated debate across racing community
articles.description: IndyCar removed a Freedom 250 t-shirt after fans called its “One Nation / One Race” slogan offensive and insensitive. The shirt featured Abraham Lincoln wearing a racing helmet and quickly sparked backlash across social media. Motorsport writers and fans criticized the design, while IndyCar later confirmed it pulled the item from its online store following customer complaints.

articles.title: Stefon Diggs eyes NFL return with Instagram post on stats as New York Giants trade rumor surfaces
articles.description: Stefon Diggs’ viral Instagram post reignited speculation surrounding his NFL future and a possible Patriots return.

articles.title: ‘Who can stop him?’ Kagiso Rabada handed near-impossible task of keeping Vaibhav Sooryavanshi quiet
articles.description: Looking ahead to Sooryavanshi’s next battle vs Gujarat Titans, Pathan singled out Kagiso Rabada as the bowler most capable of troubling the teenage sensation.

articles.title: IPL: Mitchell Marsh's record ton makes him LSG's top-five run-getter
articles.description: Mitchell Marsh hit the fastest century for LSG in IPL history, a 49-ball ton, in a match against RCB. He scored 111 off 56 balls, becoming the franchise's fourth-highest run-scorer and securing his second ton for the team.

articles.title: Ruiz leads Nationals' offense in win over Twins
articles.description: Keibert Ruiz racked up four RBIs, thanks to his second homer of the season and a pair of doubles, in the Washington Nationals' 7-5 victory over the visiting Minnesota Twins on Thursday.

articles.title: Dianna Russini didn't name son after Mike Vrabel. Truth about husband's unusual demand
articles.description: Fresh claims about Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel have sparked another wave of speculation

articles.title: Why is Tyreek Hill in court again? The Sophie Hall lawsuit explained
articles.description: NFL star Tyreek Hill faces a civil lawsuit from influencer Sophie Hall, who alleges he broke her leg during backyard football drills. Hall claims Hill became enraged after she pushed him, then charged her with force. Hill's defense suggests she tripped over his dog. During a deposition, Hill admitted to touching Hall's breasts, describing it as "foreplay-ish."

articles.title: NFL Trade Rumor: New York Giants could make a move for $69M former New England Patriots star to strengthen offense around young stars
articles.description: The New York Giants have recorded a brutal run on the field in the last few years as the team ranked last in the NFL East in 2024 as well as 2025, sparking concern among fans. With just 4 wins and 13 losses in the last season, all focus are on the New York Giants’ performance in the new season.

articles.title: Dianna Russini reportedly coping with grief as she deals with heartbreak while Mike Vrabel keeps distance from affair rumors
articles.description: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, and former New York Times’ popular NFL insider and reporter, Dianna Russini, have stayed distant from one another ever since their alleged affair rumors began last month after they were spotted in Arizona. While Dianna Russini ended up losing her job at The Athletic, it seems she is also dealing with some grief in her life.

articles.title: LSG's Prince Yadav reveals Virat Kohli as inspiration behind match-winning spell against RCB: 'After the last match...'
articles.description: Pacer Prince Yadav starred in Lucknow Super Giants' thrilling six-run victory over Royal Challengers Bengaluru on Thursday with a haul of 3/33, which included an eye-catching dismissal of veteran superstar Virat Kohli.

articles.title: “Like a love song...”: Joe Burrow’s rumored girlfriend Olivia Ponton makes a cryptic post as the star player sparks outrage
articles.description: Joe Burrow, the Cincinnati Bengals’ star player, is focused on bouncing back on the field after recovering from his brutal injuries as dating rumors with model and influencer, Olivia Ponton, continues to dominate headlines for close to two years. Over the last few weeks, the rumored high profile couple have been making a number of public appearances together. Amid this, Olivia Ponton has dropped a cryptic hint about her life.

articles.title: Why are Jaylen Brown and Stephen A. Smith publicly beefing? Here’s the full story
articles.description: Boston Celtics player Jaylen Brown faced criticism after a playoff exit. He spoke out about referees and Joel Embiid on Twitch. This led to a fine and a public exchange with Stephen A. Smith. Brown's comments and reactions have become a major talking point in the NBA offseason. The situation highlights differing perspectives on player conduct and media commentary.

articles.title: Rampage Jackson’s son Raja Jackson escapes lengthy prison sentence after disturbing Syko Stu wrestling assault
articles.description: Raja Jackson, son of MMA legend Quinton “Rampage” Jackson, accepted a plea deal in the 2025 Syko Stu wrestling attack case. He pleaded no contest to felony battery, is expected to serve 90 days in jail, two years probation, and pay nearly $82,000 after seriously injuring fellow wrestler Syko Stu during a live Los Angeles wrestling event.

articles.title: IndyCar T-shirt withdrawn after slogan causes outrage
